name: 01 — RSS Feed Intake (Every 2 Hours)
_comment: ARCHITECTURE NOTE: n8n does NOT re-implement scoring, dedup, or classification. It only triggers the Netlify ingest-scheduled function which calls _shared/scoring.js and _shared/dedup.js. Set SITE_URL env var to your Netlify site URL.

nodes.name: Trigger Scheduled Ingest
nodes.notes: The ingest-scheduled Netlify function handles all business logic including scoring, dedup, and logging. n8n only triggers it.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'ingestion_complete', payload: { triggeredBy: 'n8n', runAt: new Date().toISOString() } }) }}
